command.hpfs.availability-zone.list.desc: List availability zones supporting HPFS in a region.
command.hpfs.cluster.list-by-device.desc: List HPFS clusters for a bare-metal device flavour.
command.hpfs.file-system.create.descript: Create one or more HPFS file systems.
command.hpfs.file-system.delete.descript: Delete or unsubscribe from an HPFS file system.
command.hpfs.file-system.list-by-cluster: List HPFS file systems in a cluster.
command.hpfs.file-system.list-by-label.d: List HPFS file systems matching labels.
command.hpfs.file-system.list-by-storage: List HPFS file systems by storage type.
command.hpfs.file-system.resize.descript: Increase an HPFS file system's capacity.
command.hpfs.file-system.show-by-name.de: Retrieve an HPFS file system by name.
command.hpfs.file-system.show.descriptio: Retrieve an HPFS file system by ID.
command.hpfs.fileset.create.description: Create a FILESET in an HPFS file system.
command.hpfs.label.list-by-file-system.d: List labels bound to an HPFS file system.
command.hpfs.label.update.description: Bind or unbind labels on an HPFS file system.
command.hpfs.quota.allocable.description: Retrieve allocable HPFS capacity and file-count quota.
command.hpfs.quota.count.description: Retrieve HPFS file-system count quota usage.
command.hpfs.quota.dataflow.description: Retrieve dataflow-policy quota usage for an HPFS file system.
name: High Performance File Storage
parameter.hpfs.availability-zone.list.pa: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.availability-zone.list.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.az_name.des: Availability-zone name; required in a 4.0 region.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.cluster_nam: HPFS cluster name; supported only in regions that allow explicit cluster selection.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.page_no.des: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.page_size.d: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.baseline.list.sfs_type.de: HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list-by-device.eb: Bare-metal device flavour used to filter compatible HPFS clusters.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list-by-device.pa: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list-by-device.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.az_name.desc: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.ebm_device_t: Bare-metal device flavour used to filter compatible HPFS clusters.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.page_no.desc: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.page_size.de: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.cluster.list.sfs_type.des: HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.create.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.create.task: Dataflow-task description containing at most 128 characters.
Dataflow-task type: import_data, import_metadata, or export_data.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.az_nam: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.page_n: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.page_s: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.task_s: Dataflow-task status filter: creating, executing, completed, canceling, or fail.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.list.task_t: Dataflow-task type: import_data, import_metadata, or export_data.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow-task.show.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.auto_expo: Whether automatic export is enabled. Exactly one of automatic import and automatic export must be enabled; enabling both or neither is invalid. Export data type and trigger are required when true.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.auto_impo: Whether automatic import is enabled. Exactly one of automatic import and automatic export must be enabled; enabling both or neither is invalid. Import data type and trigger are required when true.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.bucket_na: Name of an existing standard-storage object bucket used by the dataflow policy.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.bucket_pr: Optional object-bucket prefix used by the dataflow policy.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.dataflow_: Dataflow-policy description containing at most 128 characters.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.export_da: Export data type; only data is supported and it is required when automatic export is enabled.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.export_tr: Automatic-export trigger: new for newly created data, or changed for newly created and modified data; required when automatic export is enabled.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.import_da: Import data type: data or metadata; required when automatic import is enabled.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.import_tr: Automatic-import trigger; only new is supported and it is required when automatic import is enabled.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.create.sfs_direc: FILESET directory used by the dataflow policy. Equivalent spellings with or without leading or trailing / resolve to the same directory.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.delete.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.list.az_name.des: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.list.page_no.des: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.list.page_size.d: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.list.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.show.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.update.auto_sync: Whether automatic synchronisation is enabled for the dataflow policy.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.update.dataflow_: Dataflow-policy description containing at most 128 characters.
parameter.hpfs.dataflow.update.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.directory.create.director: Directory path to create, with at most 1,000 levels, 255 bytes per component, and 4,096 bytes in total.
Directory owner group ID from 0 to 4294967294; default is 0.
Three-digit directory permission mode with each digit from 0 to 7; default is 755.
Directory owner user ID from 0 to 4294967294; default is 0.
parameter.hpfs.directory.create.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
Directory path to inspect, with at most 1,000 levels, 255 bytes per component, and 4,096 bytes in total.
parameter.hpfs.directory.show.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.az_nam: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.baseli: Performance baseline in MB/s/TB, supported only by some regions.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.client: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.cluste: HPFS cluster name; supported only in regions that allow explicit cluster selection.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.cycle_: Subscription cycle count; required when on-demand billing is false and limited to a maximum total term of three years.
Subscription cycle type: year or month; required when on-demand billing is false.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.label_: JSON array of label objects. Label updates use key, value, and BIND or UNBIND operation values; label queries use key and value.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.on_dem: Whether the file system uses on-demand billing; default is true and currently only on-demand ordering is supported. Cycle type and count are required when false.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.order_: Number of identically configured file systems to create, from 1 to the remaining quota and at most 20; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.projec: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.sfs_na: HPFS file-system name unique within the account and region.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.sfs_pr: File-system protocol; only hpfs is supported.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.sfs_si: HPFS file-system capacity in GB, starting at 512 GB in 512 GB increments.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.sfs_ty: HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.subnet: Subnet ID associated with the new file system; HPFS protocol orders do not validate this field.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.create.vpc_id: VPC ID associated with the new file system; HPFS protocol orders do not validate this field.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.delete.client: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.delete.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list-by-clust: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
HPFS cluster name; supported only in regions that allow explicit cluster selection.
Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list-by-label: JSON array of label objects. Label updates use key, value, and BIND or UNBIND operation values; label queries use key and value.
Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list-by-stora: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
Region ID used to scope the request.
HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.
Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.fuzzy_na: Partial HPFS file-system name used for fuzzy matching.
Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.page_siz: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.project_: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.sfs_prot: File-system protocol; only hpfs is supported.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.list.sfs_stat: File-system status filter: creating, available, expired, or unusable.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.rename.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.rename.sfs_na: HPFS file-system name unique within the account and region.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.resize.client: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.resize.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.resize.sfs_si: New HPFS file-system capacity in GB; expansion only, starting at 512 GB in 512 GB increments and subject to quota.
Region ID used to scope the request.
HPFS file-system name unique within the account and region.
parameter.hpfs.file-system.show.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.create.capacity_q: FILESET capacity quota in GiB, starting at 10 GiB in 1 GiB increments and limited by available file-system capacity.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.create.file_count: FILESET file-count quota, starting at 10,000 files in increments of 1,000 and limited by the available file count.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.create.fileset_de: FILESET description containing at most 128 characters.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.create.fileset_pa: Absolute FILESET path beginning and ending with /, with a maximum depth of three below the root.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.create.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.delete.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.list.az_name.desc: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.list.fileset_stat: FILESET status filter: available or unusable.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.list.page_no.desc: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.list.page_size.de: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.list.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.show.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.update.capacity_q: Updated FILESET capacity quota in GiB; it cannot be smaller than used capacity and cannot exceed available capacity plus the FILESET's current allocation.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.update.file_count: Updated FILESET file-count quota; it cannot be smaller than the used count and cannot exceed the available count plus the FILESET's current allocation.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.update.fileset_de: FILESET description containing at most 128 characters.
parameter.hpfs.fileset.update.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.label.list-by-file-system: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.label.update.label_list.d: JSON array of label objects. Label updates use key, value, and BIND or UNBIND operation values; label queries use key and value.
parameter.hpfs.label.update.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.create.i: Endpoint IP version: 0 for IPv4, 1 for IPv6, or 2 for dual stack; default is 0 and the field applies only when VPCE creation is enabled. Pure IPv6 and dual-stack endpoint creation are currently unsupported.
Whether to create a VPC endpoint; default is false. This option applies only to 4.0 resource pools. Subnet ID is required when true.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.create.p: Protocol-service description containing at most 128 characters.
Protocol-service specification; only general is supported.
Protocol-service type; only nfs is supported.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.create.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.create.s: Subnet ID for the protocol service; required in a 3.0 region and when VPCE creation is enabled in a 4.0 region.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.create.v: VPC ID used by the protocol service.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.delete.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.list.az_: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.list.pag: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.list.pro: Protocol-service status filter: creating, available, deleting, create_fail, or agent_err.
Protocol-service specification; only general is supported.
Protocol-service type; only nfs is supported.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.list.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.protocol-service.show.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.quota.allocable.region.de: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.quota.capacity.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.quota.count.region.descri: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.quota.dataflow.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.hpfs.region.list.page_no.descr: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
parameter.hpfs.region.list.page_size.des: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
